titleStmt.title: SII 37.200: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 200. (A.R. No. E 9 of 1939-40.) Tāḻḻūru, Peddapuram Taluk, East Godavari District.

summary.p: Pillar lying in the temple of Śrī Veṅkaṭēśvara (also called Sātānimaṭha).
This is dated Śaka 1324, Chitrabhānu, Pushya śu. 3, Wednesday, Makarasaṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1402 A.D., December 27,

It records the setting up a ghaṭika-yantra and a bell by Bhaṇḍāru-seṭṭi in the temple of Gōpināthadēva inside the fort of Rājamahēndranagara and also a gift of 8 puṭṭis of land after purchase to four brāhmaṇas for performing the service of Ghaḍiyārōpachāra (sounding the bell) to indicate the hours of worship in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Iṁdīvaradaḷaśyāmamiṁdirānaṁdaka
ṁdalaṁ suṁdaraṁ gadāvāsamaṁdira
mahā mahā nṛpati bhū
dānadīkṣā gu vinayo
vīra[¨r]nnavō tilakastāsya
nu janmāsu bhūpālō
nṛpālō nnannavō
tajāmā pati vija[Ī]
raṁjaya patikuṁ
. ta khaṁḍa
para rivavīra yajñaḥ Ā
jñāṁ va¨rhakā ya
dha¨rmmahētōḥ śrī śā

kāṁbudhinētra viśvagaṇitēbdē citrabhānau ravē
mahīsurataru¨rbaṁḍāru seṭṭiprabhuḥ . sōyaṁ rājamahē
ṁdranāmanagarēvaprāṁttarē gōpikānādhāyā¨rccana kālamā
na ghaṭikāyaṁtrīṁcca ghaṁṭāmadāt . gōpīnādhasya tasyēva grā
mē krītvāṣṭa khārikāḥ . kṣētraṁ dvijēbhyō ghaṭikāmāyibhyō
jīvikāmadāt śrīvallabhā¨ryya putrēṇa kaṇvagōtrāṇa dhīma
tāḥ . śrīvallabhēna racitaṁ śāsanaṁ jayatācciraṁ . svasti śrī śaka
va¨rṣaṁbulu 1324 Agunēṁṭi citrabhānu saṁvatsara puṣya śu 3 bu nāṁ
ṭi makara saṁkramaṇa puṇyakālamaṁddunu kāṭamareḍḍi vēmāreḍḍigāri Ānati
ni komaragiri reḍḍiṁgārikiṁni vāri dēvulakuṁnnu śāśvatamulaina kī¨rtti su
tamulu kalugunaṭṭugānu rājamahēṁdravarapukōṭalōni śrī gōpikā
nādha dēvarakunu pūjakālajñānā¨rtthamai ghaḍiyārōpacāramu bhaṁ
ḍāru seṭṭinaṁgāru sama¨rppiṁciri yī ghaḍiyāraṁ vaḍḍibrāṁhmalu sūre
mayyala māranna . bollāŌjhyala dēvaramma . peddibhaṭlamācana . pedyōjhya
Annamō jhyulu . yīnalugurakunnu śrī gōpikānādhadēvara
paṟulanu kālōcita mūlyaṁ veṭṭipēranu reṁḍēsi puṭlu kṣētraṁ

maḍi vuṭlukṣētraṁ velciyicciri . yī dhaṁ¨rmamu Ā
caṁdrā¨rkamu . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyun . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁddharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pā
lanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmassē
tu nṛpāṇaṁ kālē kālē pālanīyaṁ bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rrvānnētān bhāvinaḥ pā¨rddhi
vēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . śrīṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
